revision.text:
'''甲午'''（きのえうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて31番目で、前は[[癸巳]]、次は[[乙未]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（木生火）である。
==甲午の年==
==甲午の日== ===[[選日]]=== 甲午の日は[[天一天上]]の2日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲午'''（きのえうま、こうぼくのうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの31番目で、前は[[癸巳]]、次は[[乙未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==甲午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って34が余る年が甲午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[34年]] *[[94年]] *[[154年]] *[[214年]] *[[274年]] *[[334年]] *[[394年]] *[[454年]] *[[514年]] *[[574年]] *[[634年]] *[[694年]] *[[754年]] *[[814年]] *[[874年]] *[[934年]] *[[994年]] | *[[1054年]] *[[1114年]] *[[1174年]] *[[1234年]] *[[1294年]] *[[1354年]] *[[1414年]] *[[1474年]] *[[1534年]] *[[1594年]] *[[1654年]] *[[1714年]] *[[1774年]] *[[1834年]] *[[1894年]] *[[1954年]] | *[[2014年]] *[[2074年]] *[[2134年]] *[[2194年]] *[[2254年]] *[[2314年]] *[[2374年]] *[[2434年]] *[[2494年]] *[[2554年]] *[[2614年]] *[[2674年]] *[[2734年]] *[[2794年]] *[[2854年]] *[[2914年]] *[[2974年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]27年（1894年） - [[甲午農民戦争]]（東学党の乱）。
==甲午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[5月]]が甲午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲午の日== 甲午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲午の日は[[天一天上]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{甲午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:甲午]]

==甲午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って34が余る年が甲午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[34年]] *[[94年]] *[[154年]] *[[214年]] *[[274年]] *[[334年]] *[[394年]] *[[454年]] *[[514年]] *[[574年]] *[[634年]] *[[694年]] *[[754年]] *[[814年]] *[[874年]] *[[934年]] *[[994年]] | *[[1054年]] *[[1114年]] *[[1174年]] *[[1234年]] *[[1294年]] *[[1354年]] *[[1414年]] *[[1474年]] *[[1534年]] *[[1594年]] *[[1654年]] *[[1714年]] *[[1774年]] *[[1834年]] *[[1894年]] *[[1954年]] | *[[2014年]] *[[2074年]] *[[2134年]] *[[2194年]] *[[2254年]] *[[2314年]] *[[2374年]] *[[2434年]] *[[2494年]] *[[2554年]] *[[2614年]] *[[2674年]] *[[2734年]] *[[2794年]] *[[2854年]] *[[2914年]] *[[2974年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]27年（1894年） - [[甲午農民戦争]]（東学党の乱）。
==甲午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[5月]]が甲午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午'''（きのえうま、こうぼくのうま、こうご）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの31番目で、前は[[癸巳]]、次は[[乙未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は[[陽]]の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==甲午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って34が余る年が甲午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[34年]] *[[94年]] *[[154年]] *[[214年]] *[[274年]] *[[334年]] *[[394年]] *[[454年]] *[[514年]] *[[574年]] *[[634年]] *[[694年]] *[[754年]] *[[814年]] *[[874年]] *[[934年]] *[[994年]] | *[[1054年]] *[[1114年]] *[[1174年]] *[[1234年]] *[[1294年]] *[[1354年]] *[[1414年]] *[[1474年]] *[[1534年]] *[[1594年]] *[[1654年]] *[[1714年]] *[[1774年]] *[[1834年]] *[[1894年]] *[[1954年]] | *[[2014年]] *[[2074年]] *[[2134年]] *[[2194年]] *[[2254年]] *[[2314年]] *[[2374年]] *[[2434年]] *[[2494年]] *[[2554年]] *[[2614年]] *[[2674年]] *[[2734年]] *[[2794年]] *[[2854年]] *[[2914年]] *[[2974年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]27年（1894年） - [[甲午農民戦争]]（東学党の乱）。
==甲午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[5月]]が甲午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲午の日== 甲午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲午の日は[[天一天上]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Horse-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Horse-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Horse}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲午]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Horse]]

==甲午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[5月]]が甲午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲午の日== 甲午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲午の日は[[天一天上]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Horse-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Horse-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲午]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Horse]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh_min_nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh_yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904930]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. '''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood produces Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Horse (甲午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-uma ***Onyomi 1: koubu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Horse (甲午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-uma ***Onyomi 1: koubu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. '''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood ==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood '''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood produces Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Horse (甲午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-uma ***Onyomi 1: koubu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ
<!-- == * Yang Wood Horse (甲午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえうま (kinoe-uma) ***Onyomi: こうかのうま (kōka-no-uma) ***Onyomi: こうご (kōgo) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Horse== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 34 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Kōgo. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kōgo''' |- ! === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe === Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno
