=== Events === * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.
==Months of Yang Wood Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Horse|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|1=Horse (zodiac)|lt=Horse (午)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood produces Fire).

**  Japanese:

***Onyomi 1: koubu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Horse|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|1=Horse (zodiac)|lt=Horse (午)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood produces Fire).

==Pronunciation==

**  Japanese:

***Onyomi 1: koubu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik === Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
